prompt: Draft the Capital Structure and Shareholding Pattern section for the DRHP.
draft_section:
The authorized share capital of the Company is currently set at Rs. 3,00,000 (Rupees Three Lakh) divided into 30,000 (Thirty Thousand) equity shares of Rs. 10 (Rupees Ten) each as per the resolutions passed in the Board Meeting and subsequent amendments to the Memorandum of Association. As of the latest approved structure, the issued share capital stands at Rs. 1,50,000, with 15,000 equity shares issued and fully paid. 

The shareholding pattern reflects that Mr. Rohit Sharma and Mr. Suresh Sharma each received 192 equity shares upon resolution. All allotments were executed following the applicable provisions of Section 62(1) of the Companies Act, 2013. The equity shares issued carry nominal face value and were allotted at an agreed premium, ranking pari-passu with the existing shares regarding dividends, voting rights, and other entitlements. 

This capital structure ensures the Company maintains flexibility for further capital raising activities needed for anticipated business scaling and operational funding requirements. Any amendments to this structure have been meticulously documented, ensuring compliance with statutory provisions and approval from both Board and shareholder meetings.
requires_review: Shareholder names and allotments need verification
